title: Arctic Flight
writer: George Bricker, Ewing Scott, Robert Hill
actors: Wayne Morris, Lola Albright, Alan Hale Jr.
plot: Mike Wien, an Alaskan bush pilot operating the the Bering Sea area, makes friends with John W. Wetherby, posing as a wealthy American businessman. But, in reality, he is a Russian spy on his way to Siberia carrying microfilms of U...
